title: ui boots in Truth-Zero when core health is UNKNOWN
description: When the app loads and the health endpoint is unreachable/unknown, the UI must not hallucinate operational state. It must enter Truth-Zero (read-only / blocked critical actions) and show a clear system status indicator.
preconditions: Backend is stopped OR health endpoint returns non-200
steps: Observe the global system status component (AliveBadge / status banner)
Attempt to access order creation UI
canon_law: Law of Truth Lock + Truth Zero

title: ui becomes operational only after health is OK
description: UI must transition from Truth-Zero to Operational only when /health returns OK. This validates that UI is a consequence of confirmed truth.
steps: Wait for the health check to resolve
expected: No warnings about unknown core state

title: dark mode (The Void) is default and stable
description: Verify that Dark Mode is default, consistent across routes, and does not flicker on navigation or refresh.
steps: Navigate between ManagerDashboard and Staff views
expected: All core text remains readable with sufficient contrast

title: pulse animations sync with metabolic clock without performance drop
description: Verify usePulse-based animations (AliveBadge, MetabolicValue, heartbeat ring) animate on the 30s rhythm without causing UI jank.
steps: Trigger a value update (e.g., refresh inventory / change view)
expected: UI remains responsive while animations run

title: manager dashboard shows Hunger Signals from core-derived state
description: ManagerDashboard must render the Metabolic Hunger section based on core-derived HungerSignals (not manual user observation).
preconditions: Seed inventory low enough to trigger Warning/Urgent/Panic OR replay events that produce low stock
expected: At least one HungerSignalCard appears when stock is below threshold
Signal persists until a restock event resolves it

title: ui reflects metabolic debt (negative inventory) without hiding it
description: If inventory becomes negative (metabolic debt), UI must reflect reality (no clamping to zero, no hiding).
preconditions: An order causes inventory to drop below 0
canon_law: Law of Truth Lock + Institutional Atomicity

title: staff task stream adapts density with pressure container
description: WorkerTaskStream must adapt its density based on system pressure (PressureContainer) to reduce cognitive overload.
expected: In low pressure: tasks show richer detail
In high pressure: UI becomes denser/simplified

title: long-press confirm prevents accidental completion
description: Verify LongPressButton interaction requires intentional hold to confirm (anti-zombie).
preconditions: At least one actionable task or confirmable control exists
steps: Try a quick tap on the confirm action
Then perform a long press until completion
expected: UI provides clear progress feedback during hold

title: ai observer output is separated from core facts
description: Verify that INTELLIGENCE_* suggestions/anomalies appear in UI but do not alter core state displays (inventory/order totals).
preconditions: AI Observer stream enabled OR mocked INTELLIGENCE_* events available
expected: UI clearly labels AI output as advice/insight
canon_law: AI Sovereign Observer (Passive Consumption + Suggestive Emission)

title: ui survives ai failure (lobotomy protocol)
description: If the AI observer is down/timeouts, the UI must remain operational and the POS core loop must not be blocked.
preconditions: Ability to disable AI observer or force failure
expected: AI sections show degraded state (e.g., 'Observer Offline')
No crashes / no blocked operations due to AI
